summary_en: Yottavias completed acquisition of 2,100 shares (¥6.72M) via ToSTNeT-3 off-exchange trading on 2026-05-18 to enable future flexible capital allocation.
title_en: Notice of Acquisition Results and Completion of Share Repurchase via Off-Exchange Trading (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief:
On 2026-05-18, Yottavias Co., Ltd. (Ticker: 5598, TOKYO PRO Market) completed a share repurchase program and announced its results via this notice. The company acquired 2,100 ordinary shares at a total cost of ¥6,720,000 using the Tokyo Stock Exchange's ToSTNeT-3 off-exchange trading mechanism.

The acquisition was approved by the Board of Directors on 2026-05-15. The stated purpose is to leverage debt-financed capital to enhance enterprise value and enable flexible future capital allocation decisions. With this acquisition, the authorization granted by the Board on 2026-05-15 has been fully executed and is now concluded.
